task_description: Implement real OAuth connect/disconnect for Google services (Calendar, Tasks, Gmail, Slides) and Spotify, add profile page with editable name/timezone, and polish the Spotify mini player button. Backend provides incremental OAuth endpoints storing tokens in Firestore. Frontend Settings page uses real status from backend instead of localStorage toggles.

verification.summary: Frontend build succeeds (all 11 pages). Lint passes with no errors. Backend py_compile passes for all modified files. Review issues addressed: CSRF protection added to OAuth state, token revocation on disconnect, conditional Spotify indicator, error feedback in frontend, dead callback page removed.
